mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS statDate, COUNT(1) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 2)) AS successAmount FROM t_payment_order GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY statDate DESC LIMIT 7

SELECT channel_code AS channelCode, payment_method AS paymentMethod, COUNT(1) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, CONCAT( FORMAT( CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(1) END, 2 ), '%' ) AS successRate, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 2)) AS successAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PREPAY_CREATED', 'WAIT_CALLBACK') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount FROM t_payment_order GROUP BY channel_code, payment_method ORDER BY totalCount DESC, successCount DESC

SELECT 'WAIT_CALLBACK_TIMEOUT' AS alertType, '支付回调待收口' AS alertTitle, '仍有支付单处于待回调状态，需要主动查单或补回调。' AS alertMessage, 'P1' AS alertLevel, 'danger' AS alertLevelType, COUNT(1) AS affectedCount FROM t_payment_order WHERE status = 'WAIT_CALLBACK' HAVING COUNT(1) > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'REFUND_FAIL' AS alertType, '退款失败待重试' AS alertTitle, '退款单存在失败记录，需要运营复核后重试或切线下处理。' AS alertMessage, 'P1' AS alertLevel, 'danger' AS alertLevelType, COUNT(1) AS affectedCount FROM t_refund_order WHERE status = 'FAIL' HAVING COUNT(1) > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'CHANNEL_DISABLED' AS alertType, '渠道已停用' AS alertTitle, '存在已停用渠道，请确认是否需要同步调整路由规则。' AS alertMessage, 'P2' AS alertLevel, 'warn' AS alertLevelType, COUNT(1) AS affectedCount FROM t_payment_channel_config WHERE status = 'DISABLED' HAVING COUNT(1) > 0
